chart.title: Fish and seafood production
chart.subtitle: Fish and seafood production is measured as the sum of seafood from wild catch and fish farming (aquaculture).
chart.citation: Food and Agriculture Organization of the United Nations (2025)

Fish and seafood | 00002960 || Productio.descriptionProcessing: The latest FAOSTAT release (published on 2025-10-28) is missing data for Benin, Burundi, Central African Republic, Chad, Dominica, Japan, Mali, Somalia, South Sudan, Sudan, and Togo, due to an ongoing review. To avoid data gaps, we sourced data for those countries from a previous FAOSTAT release.
Fish and seafood | 00002960 || Productio.citationShort: Food and Agriculture Organization of the United Nations (2025) – processed by Our World in Data
Fish and seafood | 00002960 || Productio.citationLong: Food and Agriculture Organization of the United Nations (2025) – processed by Our World in Data. “Fish and seafood - Production (tonnes)” [dataset].
